summary: Iteration 183: Citation Validation & Metadata Quality Testing complete. All 37 backend tests pass. Frontend testing verified: (1) Amber warning banner appears correctly on case detail page with missing metadata (data-testid='jurisdiction-warnings'), (2) Warning banner shows 3 warnings for state, offence_category, offence_type, (3) Case with complete metadata does NOT show warning banner, (4) ReportsSection metadata confirmation dialog is correctly gated behind documents check (no dialog if no documents), (5) Payment History page works correctly, (6) Login endpoint works correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: validate_citation correctly validates real Australian citations (e.g. 'R v Smith [2023] NSWCCA 123' returns valid=True with confidence >= 0.5)
validate_citation correctly rejects placeholder citations ([Surname], [Year], [Citation], [Full Citation] patterns)
validate_citation correctly rejects suspicious patterns ('citation not available', 'section unknown')
validate_similar_cases removes hallucinated similar cases and keeps valid ones with verification_status
strip_hallucinated_citations removes lines with placeholder/suspicious patterns while preserving valid content
validate_law_sections removes placeholder section entries ('not provided', 'unknown', 'n/a', 'tbd', 'placeholder')
validate_case_metadata returns warnings for missing state/offence_category/offence_type and complete=True when all fields filled
_VALID_COURT_ABBREVS contains all real Australian court abbreviations (HCA, CLR, FCA, NSWCCA, VSCA, QCA, etc.)
Auto-detect valid_cats includes new offence categories: cybercrime, arson, perjury, environmental
Auto-detect valid_sts includes 'federal' for Commonwealth/federal jurisdiction
Frontend CaseDetail.jsx correctly displays amber warning banner with data-testid='jurisdiction-warnings' when metadata is incomplete
ReportsSection metadata confirmation dialog is correctly gated - only shows when documents exist AND metadata is incomplete
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 183 verified citation validation and metadata quality features. Key findings: (1) Citation validation module (services/case_validation.py) correctly validates real Australian citations and rejects placeholders/suspicious patterns, (2) validate_similar_cases removes hallucinated cases, (3) strip_hallucinated_citations removes suspicious lines from generated text, (4) validate_law_sections removes placeholder section entries, (5) validate_case_metadata returns warnings for missing fields, (6) Auto-detect in documents.py includes new offence categories (cybercrime, arson, perjury, environmental) and federal jurisdiction, (7) Frontend warning banner appears correctly for cases with missing metadata, (8) ReportsSection metadata confirmation dialog is gated behind documents check (correct behavior). Test cases: case_d0f0469d5cab (state=None, offence_category=None, offence_type=None) shows warning banner with 3 warnings, case_f8bf63e9dcbe (state=nsw, offence_category=homicide, offence_type=murder) shows no warning banner.
